title: Implement the slugify() utility function
prompt: Implement the slugify() function in src/slugify.js. It should lowercase the input, trim it, and replace any run of non-alphanumeric characters with a single hyphen, with no leading or trailing hyphens. Verify your work by running `node check.js`, which must exit 0.

judgeRubric.criteria: Is the slugify implementation correct and idiomatic — lowercasing, trimming, and collapsing non-alphanumeric runs into single hyphens without leading/trailing hyphens — using built-in string methods rather than adding dependencies?
